rationale: Guard on the ensures-antecedent so the four ensures-conjuncts are in scope, then chain `r1@ == self_@[*k] == r2@` to get AbstractEndPoint view equality. AbstractEndPoint structural equality unfolds to `r1.id@ == r2.id@` (Seq<u8>). Broadcast `group_vec_axioms` and use `=~=` to lift Seq view equality through to Vec equality, then EndPoint single-field structural equality gives `r1 == r2 = det_get_equal(r1, r2)`.
